name: Kronoberg County (Sweden)

colors.symbolism: the gules field of the Smaland arms

description: A square red flag charged centrally with the gold crossbow of the Smaland provincial arms.
history: The flag is the heraldic banner of the arms of Kronoberg County, derived from the medieval coat of arms of the historic province of Smaland.

features.symbolism: the gules field of the historic Smaland provincial arms
a gold crossbow on a red field, the historic emblem of the province of Smaland of which Kronoberg County forms a part.
